'''鈭歮-g-l''' ('''kamagal''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quadruplex|quadruplex]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-g-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quadruplex|quadruplex]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歮-g-l
|-
! Lemma
| kamagal
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimagal|thimagal]] || [[word:jimagal|jimagal]] || [[word:shimagal|shimagal]] || [[word:kimagal|kimagal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumagal|thuthumagal]] || [[word:jujumagal|jujumagal]] || [[word:shushumagal|shushumagal]] || [[word:kukumagal|kukumagal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thumagal|thumagal]] || [[word:jumagal|jumagal]] || [[word:shumagal|shumagal]] || [[word:kumagal|kumagal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thumagal|thumagal]] || [[word:jumagal|jumagal]] || [[word:shumagal|shumagal]] || [[word:kumagal|kumagal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:themagal|themagal]] || [[word:jemagal|jemagal]] || [[word:shemagal|shemagal]] || [[word:kemagal|kemagal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothomagal|thothomagal]] || [[word:jojomagal|jojomagal]] || [[word:shoshomagal|shoshomagal]] || [[word:kokomagal|kokomagal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomagal|thomagal]] || [[word:jomagal|jomagal]] || [[word:shomagal|shomagal]] || [[word:komagal|komagal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomagal|thomagal]] || [[word:jomagal|jomagal]] || [[word:shomagal|shomagal]] || [[word:komagal|komagal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙magal|th忙magal]] || [[word:j忙magal|j忙magal]] || [[word:sh忙magal|sh忙magal]] || [[word:k忙magal|k忙magal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathamagal|thathamagal]] || [[word:jajamagal|jajamagal]] || [[word:shashamagal|shashamagal]] || [[word:kakamagal|kakamagal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thamagal|thamagal]] || [[word:jamagal|jamagal]] || [[word:shamagal|shamagal]] || [[word:kamagal|kamagal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamagal|thamagal]] || [[word:jamagal|jamagal]] || [[word:shamagal|shamagal]] || [[word:kamagal|kamagal]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shamagal|shamagal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshamagal|goshamagal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishamagal|gokishamagal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shamagaln眉|shamagaln眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshamagalnkn眉|goshamagalnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishamagaln眉|gokishamagaln眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shamagalsh毛|shamagalsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshamagalnksh毛|goshamagalnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishamagalsh毛|gokishamagalsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamagalro|shamagalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamagalnkro|goshamagalnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamagalro|gokishamagalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shamagalmu|shamagalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamagalnkmu|goshamagalnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamagalmu|gokishamagalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shamagalsher|shamagalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshamagalnksher|goshamagalnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishamagalsher|gokishamagalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shamagalng|shamagalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshamagalnkng|goshamagalnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishamagalng|gokishamagalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shamagalya|shamagalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshamagalnkya|goshamagalnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishamagalya|gokishamagalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shamagalyam|shamagalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshamagalnkyam|goshamagalnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishamagalyam|gokishamagalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamagaln眉sh毛|shamagaln眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamagalnkn眉sh毛|goshamagalnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamagaln眉sh毛|gokishamagaln眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamagaln眉ro|shamagaln眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamagalnkn眉ro|goshamagalnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamagaln眉ro|gokishamagaln眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamagaln眉mu|shamagaln眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamagalnkn眉mu|goshamagalnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamagaln眉mu|gokishamagaln眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamagalsh毛n眉|shamagalsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamagalnksh毛n眉|goshamagalnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamagalsh毛n眉|gokishamagalsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamagalsh毛ro|shamagalsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamagalnksh毛ro|goshamagalnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamagalsh毛ro|gokishamagalsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamagalsh毛mu|shamagalsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamagalnksh毛mu|goshamagalnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamagalsh毛mu|gokishamagalsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamagalron眉|shamagalron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamagalnkron眉|goshamagalnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamagalron眉|gokishamagalron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamagalrosh毛|shamagalrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamagalnkrosh毛|goshamagalnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamagalrosh毛|gokishamagalrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamagalromu|shamagalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamagalnkromu|goshamagalnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamagalromu|gokishamagalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamagalmun眉|shamagalmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamagalnkmun眉|goshamagalnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamagalmun眉|gokishamagalmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamagalmush毛|shamagalmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamagalnkmush毛|goshamagalnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamagalmush毛|gokishamagalmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamagalmuro|shamagalmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamagalnkmuro|goshamagalnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamagalmuro|gokishamagalmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
